about.title: About Me
about.description: Full Stack Developer passionate about technology and innovation, with experience building modern and scalable web solutions. I enjoy turning complex ideas into intuitive and functional interfaces. I'm constantly learning new technologies and contributing to challenging projects that create real impact.

items.description: Involvement in the software development lifecycle, focusing on Java systems, Web applications, and IoT solutions. Support in automating internal processes and monitoring implementation and deployment stages of new features.
Program focused on developing systems and technological solutions, with knowledge in programming, databases, software engineering, and requirements analysis to meet business demands.
